IHyperViewProviderGetHyperviewAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the shape data for a HyperView for a given object.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.DataSources
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task<IReadOnlyList<ShapeData>> GetHyperviewAsync(
	ISession session,
	IEntity entity,
	string nodeName = null,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

session
Type: ISession
entity
Type: IEntity
Object for which to show a HyperView
nodeName (Optional)
Type: SystemString
Optional identifier of the specific overview node to use
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskIReadOnlyListShapeData
